description_long: This is a two-story Colonial-style house with a symmetrical facade, white exterior walls, and a gray gable roof. The front features a central entryway with a small porch, flanked by evenly spaced windows with shutters. The property is enclosed by a low white fence and includes a detached garage, a paved driveway, and a well-maintained yard with several mature trees and shrubs. The backyard contains a patio area with outdoor furniture and a children's play structure. Hedges line the side of the property, providing privacy and greenery. The overall setting suggests a suburban neighborhood with ample outdoor space and classic residential design elements.
description: A two-story Colonial-style house with a gray gable roof, symmetrical windows, a central entry porch, detached garage, and a fenced yard with trees and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central entry porch, detached garage to the right, and mature trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, side hedges, and a glimpse of the backyard play structure and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with patio furniture, trees, and a children's play structure, as well as the back of the house and garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, more trees, and the play structure, with the house's side elevation and roofline visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a small porch, steps, and decorative columns
